_comment: Transform Map definitions for Avennorth Pathfinder SGC. These maps define how data from the Pathfinder Gateway export is transformed and mapped to CMDB CI fields during import. Each map corresponds to a CI class and includes source-to-target column mappings, transform scripts for field-level logic, and coalesce fields for IRE identification.

transform_maps.name: Pathfinder Server Transform
transform_maps.description: Transforms server data from Pathfinder agent observations into CMDB server CI records. Servers are discovered through kernel-level eBPF/ETW monitoring.

column_mappings.description: Server hostname as reported by agent

transform_scripts.onAfter:
// Log successful transform
gs.debug('Pathfinder SGC: Transformed server CI "' + target.name + '" (sys_id=' + target.sys_id + ')');

transform_maps.name: Pathfinder App Instance Transform
transform_maps.description: Transforms application instance data discovered through process-port inference into CMDB application server CI records.

column_mappings.description: Hosting server CI (looked up by hostname)

transform_scripts.onAfter: gs.debug('Pathfinder SGC: Transformed app instance CI "' + target.name + '" on port ' + target.tcp_port);

transform_maps.name: Pathfinder Cloud Service Transform
transform_maps.description: Transforms cloud service data discovered through outbound traffic analysis (TLS SNI, DNS resolution, IP range mapping) into CMDB cloud service CI records.

transform_scripts.onAfter: gs.debug('Pathfinder SGC: Transformed cloud service CI "' + target.name + '" in region ' + target.cloud_region);

field_transforms.script:
// Normalize cloud service types to consistent categories
var typeMap = {
    's3': 'storage',
    'blob': 'storage',
    'gcs': 'storage',
    'ec2': 'compute',
    'vm': 'compute',
    'gce': 'compute',
    'rds': 'database',
    'dynamodb': 'database',
    'cosmosdb': 'database',
    'cloud sql': 'database',
    'sqs': 'messaging',
    'sns': 'messaging',
    'service bus': 'messaging',
    'pubsub': 'messaging',
    'lambda': 'serverless',
    'functions': 'serverless',
    'cloud functions': 'serverless',
    'cloudfront': 'cdn',
    'cdn': 'cdn',
    'cloud cdn': 'cdn',
    'api gateway': 'api_management',
    'apim': 'api_management'
};
var rawType = (source.service_type || '').toLowerCase();
answer = typeMap[rawType] || source.service_type || 'other';

transform_maps.name: Pathfinder Medical Device Transform
transform_maps.description: Transforms medical device data discovered through healthcare protocol analysis (HL7, FHIR, DICOM) into CMDB medical device CI records. Medical devices require careful handling due to regulatory compliance requirements.

transform_scripts.onAfter:
// Medical device transforms require audit logging for regulatory compliance
gs.info('Pathfinder SGC: Transformed medical device CI "' + target.name + '" (serial=' + target.serial_number + ', risk_tier=' + target.x_avnth_device_risk_tier + ')');

transform_maps.name: Pathfinder IoT Device Transform
transform_maps.description: Transforms IoT and IP-connected device data discovered through IoT protocol analysis (MQTT, CoAP, AMQP) into CMDB IP device CI records.

column_mappings.description: IoT device category (sensor, actuator, gateway, controller)

transform_scripts.onAfter: gs.debug('Pathfinder SGC: Transformed IoT device CI "' + target.name + '" (mac=' + target.mac_address + ', category=' + target.x_avnth_iot_category + ')');

transform_maps.name: Pathfinder Relationship Transform
transform_maps.description: Transforms relationship data from Pathfinder observed network connections into CMDB CI relationship records. Relationships are discovered through TCP connection tracking and protocol-level analysis.

column_mappings.description: Relationship confidence based on observation frequency
Total connections observed in measurement window
Total bytes transferred in measurement window
Primary protocol observed (HTTP, gRPC, SQL, HL7, etc.)

transform_scripts.onAfter: gs.debug('Pathfinder SGC: Transformed relationship "' + source.parent_name + ' -> ' + source.child_name + '" (' + source.relationship_type + ')');
